# Da Bay sicks

### **The Basics**

**Every character sheet lists three personal XP triggers.**  
 Hit any trigger → mark 1 XP (2 XP if it happened several times).  
 **At 10 XP you level up:** either

* raise one Stand Coin stat **one grade** (if this hits **A**, you also unlock a free Standard Ability), **or**

* gain **\+2 Action dots** (split as you like, obeying the normal per-action cap).

---

#### **Fiction → Position / Effect → Roll → Fallout.**

* The dice never decide **what** you attempt—only **how** it turns out.

* Stress fuels greatness *and* drags you toward collapse.

* Stuck? Advance a clock and ask, “What do you do next?”

---

### **Core System**

Roll **d6s \= Action dots** \+ bonus dice (push, assist, bargain, gear).  
 6 \= success · 4-5 \= success **with** consequence · 1-3 \= failure · Two 6s \= **Critical** (+1 Effect).

---

### **Actions & Attributes**

| Attribute | Actions | Sample moves |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Insight** | Hunt · Study · Survey · Tinker | track prey, research, craft |
| **Prowess** | Prowl · Skirmish · Finesse · Wreck | sneak, brawl, pick pockets, blow doors |
| **Resolve** | Bizarre · Sway · Command · Consort | sense Stands, persuade, rally, connect |

Start with **7 dots**, max 2 per action.

---

### **Stress & Trauma**

Push (+1d or \+1 Effect) → 2 Stress   ·  Assist → 1 Stress   ·  Resist → roll attribute; pay **6 – highest die** Stress (min 1).  
 Fill the bar, take a **Trauma** and clear Stress. Four Traumas \= retirement or doom.

---

### **Progress Clocks**

Draw a 4/6/8-segment circle for any rising threat or goal.  
 Success ticks wedges; the GM can tick danger clocks on failures or time jumps.

---

### **Action Roll (full loop)**

1 Intent & Action · 2 Group?—leader takes 1 Stress per 1-3 rolled · 3 Set Position & Effect · 4 Roll · 5 Apply consequences; player may **Resist** or spend **Armor** · 6 If **Desperate**, mark \+1 XP in that attribute.

---

### **Effect**

Great \= two ticks on a 4-clock · Standard \= expected · Limited \= partial.

---

### **Setting Position & Effect**

| Position | Feel | Max consequence |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| Controlled | Advantage | Level-1 harm / small clock |
| Risky (default) | Tense | Level-2 harm / big clock |
| Desperate | Life-or-limb | Level-3 harm / lost initiative |

**Tier check:** Up-tier vs. target? player bumps Position *or* Effect; down-tier? GM drops one.

---

### **Consequences & Harm**

Worse Position · Reduced Effect · Complication / clock tick · Harm (Lv 1-4).  
 Penalties: Lv 2 \= \-1d · Lv 3 \= need help · Lv 4 \= fatal (unless resisted).

---

### **Resistance & Armor**

Roll attribute → Stress cost 6 – highest die (0 on crit).  
 Durability S/A can downgrade harm **two** levels at once.  
 Spend one **Armor** charge to blunt harm by one level; refresh at downtime or scene end.

---

### **Fortune Roll**

Unopposed uncertainty: roll 1-4 dice. 1-3 bad · 4-5 mixed · 6 good.

---

### **Gathering Information**

Controlled / Standard by default; Effect \= clarity; failure may add Wanted Stars or clocks.

---

### **Coins & Stash**

**Coin** \= liquid cash. **Stash** \= retirement fund (10 Coin ⇒ 1 Stash tier).

---

### **The Faction Game**

Crew tracks Tier, Hold, Rep, Wanted Stars, Rep \+ Coin raises Tier; Star Triggers drive Wanted stars and Entanglements. Faction clocks tick toward alliance or war.

---

### **Advancement**

| Earn XP | Mark |
| ----- | ----- |
| Each **Desperate** roll | \+1 XP in that attribute |
| End-session triggers (Stand challenge · beliefs/heritage · vice/trauma) | \+1 XP each ( \+2 if frequent ) |

| Spend XP | Cost |
| ----- | ----- |
| Level-up (choose one) → • \+1 Stand-Coin grade • **or** \+2 Action dots | **10 XP** |
| New Standard or Unique Ability (if Coin stat just hit **A**, one ability is *free*) | included in level-up |
| \+1 Action dot (outside a level-up) | 5 XP |

**Development** S/A/B Stands auto-gain \+5/+4/+3 XP per session.

*Memorise these beats, throw on a soundtrack, and scream “ORA\!” when the dice hit the table.*
